title: sbom-sentinel configuration
description: Configuration file for sbom-sentinel — automated SBOM generation and vulnerability scanning.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference. Used by editors for autocompletion and validation.

manufacturer.description: Organization or manufacturer name embedded in the generated CycloneDX SBOMs.

outputDir.description: Directory where SBOM artifacts and reports are written. Can be overridden with the SENTINEL_OUTPUT_DIR environment variable.

notifications.description: Notification settings. Credentials (webhook URL, SMTP password) are provided via environment variables.

onVulnerabilities.description: Send a notification when CRITICAL or HIGH vulnerabilities are found.

onErrors.description: Send a notification when one or more repositories fail to scan.

slack.description: Slack notification settings. Set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL in the environment.

email.description: Email notification settings. Set SMTP_HOST, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS, EMAIL_FROM, EMAIL_TO in the environment.

enabled.description: Enable email notifications. Requires nodemailer (npm install nodemailer).

tokenExpiry.description: Optional map of token names to their expiry dates (YYYY-MM-DD). sbom-sentinel logs a warning and sends a notification via all configured channels when a token expires within 15 days.

sbomExport.description: SBOM component export settings. Generates a CSV with all scanned components for traceability.

enabled.description: Generate the SBOM components CSV after each scan. Defaults to true.

filePrefix.description: Prefix for the CSV filename. Result: {prefix}-YYYY_MM_DD.csv. Only alphanumeric, hyphen, underscore, and dot characters allowed.

name.description: Unique identifier for this repository. Used in report labels and artifact filenames.

cloneUrl.description: HTTPS URL used to clone the repository. For private repositories mark the repo with `"private": true` and set GITHUB_TOKEN, BITBUCKET_TOKEN, or GIT_TOKEN as appropriate. Not used when mode is 'sbom-repository'.

branch.description: Branch to clone and scan. Not used when mode is 'sbom-repository'.

type.description: Repository ecosystem type. Passed to cdxgen to select the appropriate SBOM generator. Not used when mode is 'sbom-repository'.

mode.description: SBOM generation mode. 'cdxgen' (default) clones the repository and generates SBOMs with cdxgen. 'command' runs a custom script. 'sbom-repository' reads pre-generated CycloneDX SBOMs from a local directory (requires 'path').

path.description: Required for 'sbom-repository' mode: local directory containing dated sbom-DD-MM-YYYY folders with CycloneDX JSON files. Not used in 'cdxgen' or 'command' modes.

sbomCommand.description: Shell command to run when mode is 'command'. Executed in the cloned repository root. Must produce the SBOM file at the path specified by sbomOutput.

sbomOutput.description: Relative path (from the repository root) to the SBOM file produced by sbomCommand. Only used when mode is 'command'.

enabled.description: Set to false to skip this repository without removing it from the config.

private.description: Set to true if this repository requires authentication to clone. sbom-sentinel will verify that the appropriate token (GITHUB_TOKEN, BITBUCKET_TOKEN, or GIT_TOKEN) is configured before starting the scan.

notes.description: Free-text notes for documentation purposes. Not used by sbom-sentinel.
examples: Deprecated — to be removed in Q3
